prompt: A flat vector-style logo design on a perfectly clean pure white (#FFFFFF) background. The letters L and K are formed from precise geometric straight lines suggesting architectural blueprints and building construction. The L and K share a single vertical line where they meet, creating an efficient and clever connected letterform. All strokes are uniform weight, perfectly straight, with sharp 90-degree and 45-degree angles only. The letterforms are rendered in charcoal (#2C2C2C) with a single thin gold (#C9A96E) accent line integrated into the design. Below, the text LK DESIGN AND BUILD is set in a widely-spaced thin sans-serif typeface in charcoal, with very generous letter-spacing. The entire logo is perfectly centered with generous white space around it. Crisp, clean, flat graphic design with no shadows or effects. Looks like a brand asset exported from Adobe Illustrator. Minimal, modern, architectural.
negative_prompt: shadows, gradients, 3D, paper, texture, photography, realistic, mockup, angled, tilted, perspective, noise, grain, blurry, low quality, watermark, border, frame, curves, organic shapes, decorative, ornate

settings.style: flat vector graphic design, architectural minimal
